problem id: 101e6f80
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01011110 -> 11000011
  01111111 -> 11000001
  00010100 -> 11010111
  00000001 -> 10111101
  01110110 -> 10010011
  10111111 -> 01000010
  01000100 -> 01110111
  01001010 -> 11101011
  11100101 -> 01110111

query: 01101111
predicted answer: 11100001
